hooks.command: echo '[LIS Convention Check] Verifying file conventions...' && if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" == *.java ]]; then echo '[CHECK] Java file - ensure PascalCase class name, hexagonal package structure'; fi && if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" == *.ts ]]; then echo '[CHECK] TypeScript file - ensure standalone components, no NgModules, no *ngIf/*ngFor'; fi

echo '[LIS Safety Check] Running pre-bash safety validation...' && if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|TRUNCATE'; then echo '[BLOCKED] Destructive SQL command blocked. Use Flyway migrations only.' && exit 1; fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" == *domain/model/*.java ]]; then echo '[REMINDER] Entity modified! Required actions: 1) Create Flyway migration in resources/db/migration/ 2) Update DTO in api/dto/ 3) Update MapStruct mapper in api/mapper/ 4) Ensure branchId field exists 5) Extend BaseEntity'; fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" == *.ts ]] && grep -q 'NgModule\|@NgModule' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo '[WARNING] NgModule detected in TypeScript file! RasterOneLab uses STANDALONE COMPONENTS ONLY. Remove NgModule and use standalone: true'; fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" == *.java ]] && grep -qE 'double |float |Double |Float ' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo '[WARNING] double/float detected in Java file! Use BigDecimal for ALL monetary and lab values. double/float causes precision errors in medical data.'; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" == *domain/model/*.java ]]; then echo '[REMINDER] Entity edited! Check: Flyway migration needed? DTO updated? Mapper updated? branchId present?'; fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" == *.java ]] && grep -q '@Entity' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" 2>/dev/null && ! grep -q 'branchId\|branch_id' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo '[WARNING] @Entity class missing branchId! ALL entities MUST have branchId for multi-branch support.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -q 'rm -rf'; then echo '[BLOCKED] rm -rf is not allowed. Use targeted file deletion.' && exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT" | grep -qE 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL|Tests run.*Failures: 0'; then echo '[✅ LIS Build] Build/tests completed successfully at '$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'); fi
